verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Lift up your gates and sing, Hosanna in the highest, Hosanna forevermore.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Hear how the saints (angels) sing, Hosanna to the highest, Hosanna to the King.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Lift up your gates and sing, Hosanna in the highest, Hosanna to the King.
